name: PROACTIS Procurement & Spend Management API
what_it_does: PROACTIS REST API for procurement and spend management platform targeting mid-market and public sector organizations. Enables AI agents to manage purchase requisition and purchase order workflow automation for procurement operations, handle supplier onboarding and qualification management for supply chain governance, access contract management and spend commitment tracking data for budget compliance, retrieve e-invoicing and accounts payable automation data for financial operations, handle catalog management and guided buying workflow for purchasing compliance, access supplier performance and risk data for procurement decision support, retrieve spend analytics and budget tracking data for financial management, manage supplier portal and RFx event data for strategic sourcing, handle purchase card and T&E data integration for complete spend visibility, and integrate procurement data with ERP, finance, and accounts payable systems.
use_cases: Automating purchase requisitions from procurement workflow agents
Managing supplier onboarding from supply chain governance agents
Processing e-invoices from accounts payable automation agents
Tracking contract spend from financial compliance agents
not_for: Enterprise Fortune 500 without mid-market procurement focus
Manufacturing direct spend without indirect procurement and AP focus
Simple expense management without full P2P process
best_when: A mid-market enterprise, public sector organization, or healthcare institution using PROACTIS wants AI agents to automate purchase requisitions, supplier management, e-invoicing, contract compliance, and spend analytics.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Procurement automation creates financial commitments — automated purchase order creation without budget validation and authorization creates unauthorized expenditure. Public sector PROACTIS deployments have procurement regulations (EU procurement directives, UK Crown Commercial Service rules) that require documented competitive tendering above thresholds. E-invoice automation must validate VAT and tax compliance before payment processing.

auth.notes: PROACTIS uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-tenant credentials. Webhooks for procurement workflow events. REST API with JSON. Wetherby, United Kingdom HQ. Public (LSE AIM, recently taken private by H2 Equity Partners). Strong in UK and European mid-market and public sector procurement. E-invoicing via PEPPOL network integration. Competes with Coupa, SAP Ariba, and Oracle Procurement for mid-market P2P.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module and spend volume under management
pricing.notes: Wetherby, United Kingdom. Founded 1996. Taken private by H2 Equity Partners. 1,000+ customers. Mid-market and public sector focus. UK NHS, local government, and higher education strong verticals. PEPPOL e-invoicing integration for European market. Competes with Coupa (enterprise), SAP Ariba (enterprise), and Wax Digital for UK mid-market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per client

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Public sector procurement has mandatory competitive tendering thresholds (UK £25K, EU thresholds); automated procurement above thresholds without tendering creates regulatory violations
UK/EU regulatory focus — PROACTIS is UK/European-centric; US procurement regulations and workflows may not have full coverage
PEPPOL e-invoicing — PROACTIS integrates with PEPPOL network for EU e-invoicing; US customers should verify PEPPOL applicability and local e-invoice requirements
H2 Equity Partners ownership — PROACTIS was taken private; product roadmap and API investment may shift under private equity ownership; verify current development status
Mid-market API maturity — PROACTIS API is less mature than enterprise competitors (Coupa, Jaggaer); expect less comprehensive documentation and tooling
NHS and public sector workflows — UK NHS-specific procurement workflows (NHS Supply Chain, frameworks) require public sector-specific configuration beyond standard API features
agent_readiness.security_notes: Procurement and spend management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. EU/UK/US. Supplier, contract, and spend data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. UK/EU. Supplier and procurement data.
